overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running through a futuristic desert city. The character crosses an intersection and runs along a street lined with a massive under-construction skyscraper labeled 'DRAGON', eventually entering a covered underpass. Bright midday sun illuminates the scene with harsh shadows.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: sprinting across the intersection crosswalk from the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: silver car driving on the left side of the intersection

entered.detail: tall black pole with horizontal traffic lights showing red
low industrial building with teal metal siding and horizontal ridges
tall dark skyscraper with large white vertical DRAGON signage
multiple yellow construction cranes attached to building facade
tall palm tree on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a city intersection, waiting at a red light before sprinting across the crosswalk. The traffic light changes to green as the character crosses. A silver car is visible in the distance on the left, while the massive DRAGON skyscraper dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk alongside major construction site

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the sidewalk past the construction site

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction on the left side of the street

entered.detail: modern street lamp with horizontal orange light fixture
tall futuristic buildings with industrial smoke stacks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character runs along the open sidewalk in bright sunlight, passing the palm tree and approaching the massive DRAGON skyscraper on the right. A pedestrian walks in the opposite direction on the left side of the street. The distant futuristic skyline becomes visible ahead as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass beneath elevated highway

events.description: green car passes by on the left side of the street
approaching the dark underpass structure ahead
entering the shadowed underpass with artificial ceiling lighting

agents.ego_description: running into the covered underpass beneath the elevated highway

entered.detail: massive dark concrete structure spanning the road with support pillars
tall black metal fence with horizontal bars running along the right side
fluorescent tube lights mounted on the underpass ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the elevated highway overpass as a green car passes on the left. The DRAGON skyscraper falls behind to the left as the character enters the shadowed underpass. The lighting shifts from bright sunlight to artificial fluorescent lights overhead as the character runs beneath the concrete structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sun-drenched city intersection into the artificial shadows of a concrete underpass. It begins with the character waiting at a red light before sprinting across a crosswalk as the signal turns green, with the massive DRAGON skyscraper looming over the right side of the frame. As the character continues along the open sidewalk, the camera passes a palm tree and a pedestrian while the distant futuristic skyline opens up ahead under the harsh midday sun. The scene then shifts as the character approaches an elevated highway, passing a green car before the DRAGON skyscraper recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the sunlight behind and enter the shadowed underpass, where the lighting transitions to overhead fluorescent glows beneath the heavy concrete structure.
